title: Neuronpedia Feature Explanation Lookup Table from Attribution Graph Nodes
summary: Demo notebook for the Neuronpedia Feature Explanation Lookup Table dataset. Loads 45 curated CLT feature records (from 8 capability domains: antonym, arithmetic, code_completion, country_capital, multi_hop_reasoning, rhyme, sentiment, translation) extracted from gemma-2-2b attribution graphs. Parses JSON feature records with semantic explanations, activation statistics, and graph provenance. Visualizes feature distribution across layers and domains, activation distributions, and sparsity-activation scatter plots using matplotlib.
